Mission Support for Parishes

Welcome

The Mission Department exists to serve the parishes of the Diocese of Southwark, supporting local churches to thrive in all areas of Christian mission. This is a brief overview of some of what we do and how we can help you. Do contact the team for more information and advice.

Mission Support for Parishes

    • Listen and reflect
    • Act and review
    • Discern and plan

  • Deaneries and mission

In the Mission and Evangelism pages you will find advice and resources on Fresh Expressions of Church, Mission Action Planning, evangelism, prayer, and children and youth ministry, all aimed at growing the Kingdom and engaging with the Bishop’s strategic goals for growth as laid out in Southwark Vision.

The role of the Mission and Evangelism Deaprtment is to help both individuals and churches to engage with their communities, living out God’s call in the wider world with a particular emphasis on the Five Marks of Mission.

The Five Marks of Mission are:

  1. To proclaim the Good News of the Kingdom
  2. To teach, baptise and nurture new believers
  3. To respond to human need by loving service
  4. To transform unjust structures of society, to challenge violence of every kind, and to pursue peace and reconciliation
  5. To strive to safeguard the integrity of creation and to sustain and renew the life of the earth.

What are your interests (tick as many as apply)?

The Mission and Evangelism team is part of the Diocese of Southwark. The personal data you provide us with will be used to contact you with information that is relevant to our mission and activities. We will treat your data with respect. For more information about our privacy practices please visit the Diocese of Southwark website, (http://southwark.anglican.org/information/privacy). By clicking below, you agree that we may process your personal data in accordance with these terms. Please tick the box to opt-in to our mailings and confirm you are happy with our privacy policy.

You can change your mind at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in the footer of any email you receive from us.

We use Mailchimp as our marketing platform. By clicking below to subscribe, you acknowledge that your information will be transferred to Mailchimp for processing. Learn more about Mailchimp's privacy practices here.
